name: Insurance Advisor Core Flows
description: Tests routing capabilities of the insurance advisor in realistic turns.

parts.text: I want a new auto insurance quote for a 35-year-old in MH. What is the process?
Namaste! ... I just need a few basic details ... IDV (Insured Declared Value) ...
My name is Rajesh. I'm in Mumbai. It's a 2023 Honda City.
